name: per-word-rise
title: Per Word Rise
description: Words or characters rise into place in a controlled blur-to-sharp cascade, drift gently, and hold until the cut (optional fade or up exit).
evidence: Wave I I1 approved contract build, merging the per-word and SplitTypeReveal candidates

variables.label: Text
variables.description: Text whose words or characters rise into place.

variables.label: Split
variables.description: Animate the text as words or individual characters.

variables.label: Cues
variables.description: Comma-separated seconds (from mount start) for each unit landing. Empty keeps the authored cascade rhythm.

variables.label: Accent
variables.description: Contract accent token used for the text color.

variables.label: Exit
variables.description: Optional departure. Default none: the line holds until the frame cuts.
